app.title: Windows EventLog Helpdesk
placeholder.chat_question: Ask a follow-up question about the loaded events or the completed analysis…
check.include_raw_xml: Include raw XML in Ollama context (large)
system.notice: This optional snapshot adds basic OS, CPU, memory, disk, network, reboot-pending, automatic-service and recent-hotfix context. Review or edit it before sending it to Ollama.
settings.auto_markdown: Automatically save complete Markdown after loading
settings.export_integrity_text: Complete Markdown exports always preserve every parsed field plus the original raw XML for each event. The Ollama context can be compacted separately to fit the model context window.
reports.name: File name
info.title: Windows EventLog Helpdesk
info.select_log: Select an actual event-log channel or quick view in the tree first.
info.no_model: No Ollama model is selected. Start Ollama, refresh the model list, and select a model.
info.no_selected_events: The analysis scope is set to selected rows, but no rows are selected.
info.no_chat: There is no conversation to save.
info.tts_disabled: Windows text-to-speech is disabled in Settings.
error.title: Operation failed
help.unavailable: The local help page is unavailable.
about.text:
Windows EventLog Helpdesk
Version {version} ({date})

Local Windows event-log conversion, Ollama diagnosis, follow-up chat, system context, TTS and reporting.

Original source / updates: {source}
tip.refresh_channels: Re-read the enabled event-log channels from the current Windows installation and rebuild the tree.
tip.import_evtx: Open an offline .evtx or legacy .evt file with Windows wevtutil.
tip.load_selected: Read the selected live channel or quick view in a background worker so the interface stays responsive.
tip.cancel: Request cancellation of the active operation.
tip.event_limit: Maximum number of events to read. Set 0 / All to convert the complete log; very large logs can require substantial time and memory.
tip.xpath: Optional native Windows Event Log XPath filter passed to wevtutil. Leave blank to read all events within the selected limit.
tip.search: Filter the loaded table across timestamps, providers, IDs, messages and structured fields without changing the source data.
tip.level_filter: Show only the selected event severities in the table. The complete loaded data remains available.
tip.save_markdown: Create a complete evidence export. Every event includes its summary, full flattened XML field map and raw XML.
tip.analyze: Open the analysis tab and send the selected scope as Markdown-formatted evidence plus a strict diagnostic prompt to Ollama.
tip.model: Select a model already installed in the configured Ollama instance.
tip.refresh_models: Query /api/tags on the configured Ollama endpoint without blocking the interface.
tip.response_language: Controls the language Ollama is explicitly instructed to use for analyses and follow-up answers.
tip.analysis_scope: Choose whether Ollama receives all events, actionable severities, or only selected rows.
tip.analysis_mode: Auto uses one request when the evidence fits and a hierarchical multi-pass analysis when it does not.
tip.include_snapshot: Adds locally collected system context to help correlate event errors with resources, services, updates and reboot state.
tip.include_raw_xml: Raw XML can improve edge-case diagnosis but greatly increases context use. Complete saved Markdown always contains raw XML regardless of this switch.
tip.run_analysis: Run the diagnostic pipeline in background workers. The progress bar remains active and the rest of the application remains usable.
tip.speak: Read the current analysis or answer with Windows SAPI using the selected voice.
tip.chat_question: Ask a specific troubleshooting, correlation or verification question. The current events, latest analysis and recent chat history form the context.
tip.chat_send: Send the question to the selected Ollama model in a non-blocking streaming request.
tip.chat_clear: Clear only the follow-up conversation; loaded events and analysis remain available.
tip.chat_save: Save the conversation as Markdown in a location you choose.
tip.collect_snapshot: Collect a reviewable local system snapshot in a background worker.
tip.snapshot_editor: Review, remove or add context before it is included in an Ollama request or report.
tip.ollama_endpoint: Defaults to the local Ollama API. Changing this to a remote host sends diagnostic content to that host.
tip.context_budget: Approximate character budget used before the app switches to chunked analysis or truncates secondary context.
tip.auto_markdown: Automatically preserve a complete Markdown evidence file whenever a log is loaded.
tip.auto_pdf: Automatically generate a derived PDF report after a successful Ollama analysis.
tip.tooltips_toggle: Show or hide the small explanatory information bubbles throughout the interface.
